title: The World's $1 Best Shower
summary:
My goal for the day was to find a shower, and after reading some reviews on iOverlander, we decided to make a stop at Kodachrome State Park which promised spa-like showers for only $1. They were indeed the nicest showers we have come across so far and we both enjoyed long hot showers. We also intended to play some frisbee golf but it was too windy so we bailed and went on a little hike instead. We headed out of the park and found a very pretty open spot to camp for the night. The increasing daylight means we now get to cook dinner in the daylight and it's been fun having a beautiful view right out the door while we cook.

-Helen

photos.caption: A little hike inside Kodachrome State Park
The view from camp outside Kodachrom Basin State Park
